tasks.title: Replace --spec-ref with --spec-inline
tasks.acceptance: tp review spec.md outputs spec-ref by default. --spec-inline enables inline. --spec-ref produces unknown flag error. validateModeFlags updated. review_verify.go updated. Tests updated.
tasks.closed_reason: flag replaced, logic inverted, tests updated, all pass

tasks.title: Add --minimal flag to tp next
tasks.acceptance: tp next --minimal returns {id, acceptance} JSON only. TTY forced to JSON. --peek works with --minimal. Error output unchanged.

tasks.title: Skip reason length check with --gate-passed
tasks.acceptance: tp done id short-reason --gate-passed succeeds. Without --gate-passed still enforces length. Forbidden patterns still checked with --gate-passed (deferred fails).
tasks.closed_reason: gatePassed early-return moved before min-length check. Forbidden patterns preserved. Test updated to expect short reason with --gate-passed to pass.

tasks.title: Multi-ID support for tp done
tasks.acceptance: Last arg always reason. ArbitraryArgs with manual validation. Single-ID output unchanged (string). Multi-ID returns arrays. --auto-commit rejected with multi-ID. --batch rejected with positional args. Exit 0 partial, exit 1 all-fail. In-order processing with visibility.
tasks.closed_reason: ArbitraryArgs, resolveMultiReason, runDoneSingle/Multi split, all tests pass

tasks.title: Add estimation_minutes alias
tasks.acceptance: tp add with estimation_minutes succeeds. estimate_minutes wins when both present. Zero-value check safe (0 not valid).

tasks.title: Accept acceptance as string or array
tasks.acceptance: String unchanged. Array joined with newline-dash. Empty array rejected. Empty strings rejected. Nested arrays rejected. Single-element works. ParseAcceptanceCriteria splits on newline-dash. Round-trip returns string.
tasks.closed_reason: array joined, edge cases rejected, ParseAcceptanceCriteria updated, all tests pass

tasks.title: Better --file flag error hints
tasks.acceptance: Multiple files error includes TP_FILE and --file hint. No files error includes tp init and TP_FILE hint. Messages under 200 chars.

tasks.title: Add tp use command with .tp-active
tasks.acceptance: tp use file creates .tp-active. Discovery reads .tp-active after TP_FILE. tp use --clear removes (idempotent). tp use shows active. --clear with arg is usage error. Non-existent file exits 3. Output JSON when piped. CWD only.
tasks.closed_reason: use.go created, discover.go reads .tp-active, root.go registers command, all tests pass

tasks.title: Comma-separated --affected-files
tasks.acceptance: --affected-files a.go,b.go works. Repeated flag works. Mixed works. Trim whitespace. No changes error includes --base hint. Binary-only error lists skipped types.
tasks.closed_reason: comma expansion, error messages improved, tests pass

tasks.title: Add next_step hint after --resolve-all
tasks.acceptance: --resolve-all includes next_step with template and findings path. --resolve includes next_step only when all resolved. Always included even if all skipped. JSON backward-compatible.
tasks.closed_reason: next_step added to resolve-all (always) and resolve (when all resolved), tests pass

tasks.title: Update SKILL.md, README.md, CLAUDE.md
tasks.acceptance: SKILL.md reflects --spec-inline, --minimal, multi-ID done, tp use, comma --affected-files. README.md updated. CLAUDE.md updated.
